tweets.text:
The ad race between @AnthropicAI and @OpenAI might be just as competitive as the actual model race. 

As someone who loves great advertising and advances in AI this is a lot of fun to watch. 

Really great ad from @rpnickson 👏👏

I've been creating a lot of super text heavy ads lately and in the process I realized you can 100% make the ads directly with Claude Code and bypass using any image model like Nano Banana.

Claude just designs the ad like it would design a landing page in HTML/CSS and saves it https://t.co/ZJYvMhp1f5

Using Wispr Flow when working in Claude Code is a productivity superpower. It is difficult at first to overcome the strangeness of the behavioral change because we are all so used to typing, but so worth it!
